endpoints.name: GET /info/configuration{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns an object with the current configuration that Buffer is using, including supported services, their icons and the varying limits of character and schedules.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /links/shares{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns an object with a the numbers of shares a link has had using Buffer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /profiles/{id}/schedules/update{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: "Set the posting schedules for the specified social media profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /profiles/{id}/schedules{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns details of the posting schedules associated with a social media profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /profiles/{id}/updates/pending{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: "Returns an array of updates that are currently in the buffer for an individual social media profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /profiles/{id}/updates/reorder{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Edit the order at which statuses for the specified social media profile will be sent out of the buffer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /profiles/{id}/updates/sent{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns an array of updates that have been sent from the buffer for an individual social media profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /profiles/{id}/updates/shuffle{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Randomize the order at which statuses for the specified social media profile will be sent out of the buffer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /profiles/{id}{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns details of the single specified social media profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /profiles{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns an array of social media profiles connected to a users account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /updates/create{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Create one or more new status updates.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /updates/{id}/destroy{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Permanently delete an existing status update.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /updates/{id}/interactions{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns the detailed information on individual interactions with the social media update such as favorites, retweets and likes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /updates/{id}/move_to_top{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Move an existing status update to the top of the queue and recalculate times for all updates in the queue. Returns the update with its new posting time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /updates/{id}/share{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Immediately shares a single pending update and recalculates times for updates remaining in the queue.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: POST /updates/{id}/update{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Edit an existing, individual status update.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /updates/{id}{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.description: Returns a single social media update.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.

endpoints.name: GET /user{mediaTypeExtension}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{BUFFERAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your BUFFERAPP ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MEDIATYPEEXTENSION}} with a real mediatypeextension.
